## Constitution checklist

- [ ] If this PR touches **escrow, proximity verification, location tracking, or BOLO dispatch**: a second reviewer has explicitly signed off below, and this description links to the test coverage added under [Principle II (Test-First for Money and Location)](../.specify/memory/constitution.md).
- [ ] If this PR is legal-adjacent (Privacy Policy, ToS, or anything affecting data collection or payment flows): flagged explicitly here for attorney review before merge to a release branch.
- [ ] If this PR adds a new dependency, service, or infrastructure component: the justifying principle (typically VII — Simplicity Until Proven Otherwise) is referenced above.
- [ ] If this PR changes behavior affecting contracts, plans, tasks, or user-facing flows: the relevant docs were updated (no documentation drift).

**Second reviewer sign-off** (required only if the first box above applies): @
